'''gavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placelessness|placelessness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placelessness|placelessness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gavaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gævækæth|gævækæth]] || [[word:gævækæj|gævækæj]] || [[word:gævækæsh|gævækæsh]] || [[word:gævækæ|gævækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gavavakath|gavavakath]] || [[word:gavavakaj|gavavakaj]] || [[word:gavavakash|gavavakash]] || [[word:gavavaka|gavavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gavakath|gavakath]] || [[word:gavakaj|gavakaj]] || [[word:gavakash|gavakash]] || [[word:gavaka|gavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gavafkafth|gavafkafth]] || [[word:gavafkafj|gavafkafj]] || [[word:gavafkafsh|gavafkafsh]] || [[word:gavafkaf|gavafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gavakatha|gavakatha]] || [[word:gavakaja|gavakaja]] || [[word:gavakasha|gavakasha]] || [[word:gavakaka|gavakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gavakath|gavakath]] || [[word:gavakaj|gavakaj]] || [[word:gavakash|gavakash]] || [[word:gavaka|gavaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gavakathal|gavakathal]] || [[word:gavakajal|gavakajal]] || [[word:gavakashal|gavakashal]] || [[word:gavakakal|gavakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gavakaathatha|gavakaathatha]] || [[word:gavakaajaja|gavakaajaja]] || [[word:gavakaashasha|gavakaashasha]] || [[word:gavakaaka|gavakaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gavakathan|gavakathan]] || [[word:gavakajan|gavakajan]] || [[word:gavakashan|gavakashan]] || [[word:gavakakan|gavakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gavakathaoro|gavakathaoro]] || [[word:gavakajaoro|gavakajaoro]] || [[word:gavakashaoro|gavakashaoro]] || [[word:gavakakaoro|gavakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
